headline: U.S. Treasury yields rise amid war tensions
summary: U.S. Treasury yields rose on March 4 as investors assessed the implications of the U.S.-Iran war on the global markets. ADP also released its national employment report today, as per which private employment rose by ‌63,000 jobs in February, the largest gain since July 2025. ...

headline: Treasury Yields Rise Amid Robust U.S. Job Creation
summary: Treasury yields tick higher as ADP reports better-than-expected employment in the U.S. Private-sector employers created 63,000 jobs in February, versus WSJ consensus of 48,000. The January figure is revised to 11,000 from 22,000.

raw.headline: Treasury Yields Rise Amid Robust U.S. Job Creation
raw.summary: Treasury yields tick higher as ADP reports better-than-expected employment in the U.S. Private-sector employers created 63,000 jobs in February, versus WSJ consensus of 48,000. The January figure is revised to 11,000 from 22,000.

headline: ADP: Private employers added 63,000 jobs in February, the best monthly showing since July
summary: US private employers added 63,000 roles in February, beating expectations in the best monthly gains since July, according to the private payroll processor ADP.

headline: ADP National Employment Report: Private Sector Employment Increased by 63,000 Jobs in February; Annual Pay was Up 4.5%
summary: Private sector employment increased by 63,000 jobs in February and pay was up 4.5 percent year-over-year according to the February ADP National Employment Report® produced by ADP Research in collaboration with the Stanford Digital Economy Lab ("Stanford Lab").

headline: ADP Expands AI Agent Marketplace As It Seeks Deeper Client Integration
summary: Automatic Data Processing (NasdaqGS:ADP) has introduced new AI agents within the ADP Marketplace. The launch expands ADP’s digital HR ecosystem with workflow automation and integrated talent, compliance, and workforce tools. The update focuses on multi step AI solutions designed to simplify HR operations for clients. Automatic Data Processing, trading at around $216.27, is rolling out this AI driven expansion at a time when its recent share performance has been mixed. The stock is up 5.1%...
